editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 21 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 21 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: National Flag Adoption Day — 22 July (Exam Focus)
articles.title_hi: राष्ट्रीय ध्वज अंगीकरण दिवस — 22 जुलाई (परीक्षा फोकस)
articles.summary: On 22 July 1947 the Constituent Assembly adopted India’s National Flag — saffron, white, green with the 24-spoke Ashoka Chakra.
articles.summary_hi: 22 जुलाई 1947 को संविधान सभा ने भारत का राष्ट्रीय ध्वज अपनाया — केसरिया, सफेद, हरा व 24 तीलियों वाला अशोक चक्र।
articles.content:
The Constituent Assembly of India adopted the National Flag on 22 July 1947. The design is a horizontal tricolour of India saffron, white, and India green, with the navy-blue Ashoka Chakra of 24 spokes in the centre.

Pingali Venkayya is associated with the design of the Indian National Flag. The Flag Code of India, 2002, and the Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971, govern respectful display and prohibit insults to the flag.

For IB ACIO: date (22 July 1947), 24 spokes, Flag Code 2002, and Pingali Venkayya are high-frequency facts.
articles.content_hi:
22 जुलाई 1947 — संविधान सभा ने ध्वज अपनाया। केसरिया, सफेद, हरा + 24 तीलियों वाला अशोक चक्र।

Pingali Venkayya डिज़ाइन। Flag Code 2002।

IB ACIO: 22 July 1947, 24 spokes — याद रखें।
articles.question: India’s National Flag was adopted by the Constituent Assembly on:
articles.question_hi: भारत का राष्ट्रीय ध्वज संविधान सभा ने कब अपनाया?
articles.explanation: The Constituent Assembly adopted the National Flag on 22 July 1947.
articles.explanation_hi: संविधान सभा ने 22 जुलाई 1947 को राष्ट्रीय ध्वज अपनाया।
articles.moreInfo: Related preview was in 19 July edition. Tomorrow (22 July) is Flag Adoption Day.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: 19 जुलाई पूर्वावलोकन। कल 22 जुलाई ध्वज दिवस।

articles.title: SAARC — South Asian Regional Grouping
articles.summary: SAARC has eight members and is headquartered in Kathmandu. Summits have been stalled due to India–Pakistan tensions.
articles.summary_hi: सार्क के 8 सदस्य, मुख्यालय काठमांडू। भारत–पाकिस्तान तनाव के कारण शिखर सम्मेलन रुके हुए हैं।
articles.content:
The South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (SAARC) was established in 1985. Members: Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Bhutan, India, Maldives, Nepal, Pakistan, and Sri Lanka.

The SAARC Secretariat is in Kathmandu, Nepal. Afghanistan joined as the eighth member in 2007. SAARC aims at economic and regional cooperation, but political tensions have limited progress.

India has increasingly emphasised BIMSTEC and bilateral ties when SAARC remains inactive.

For IB ACIO: founded 1985, HQ Kathmandu, 8 members, Afghanistan 2007.
articles.content_hi:
SAARC 1985। 8 सदस्य; Afghanistan 2007 में शामिल। HQ: Kathmandu।

BIMSTEC को भारत विकल्प के रूप में बढ़ावा देता है।

IB ACIO: 1985, Kathmandu, 8 सदस्य — याद रखें।
articles.question: Where is the headquarters of SAARC located?
articles.explanation: The SAARC Secretariat is located in Kathmandu, Nepal.
articles.explanation_hi: SAARC सचिवालय काठमांडू, नेपाल में स्थित है।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: BIMSTEC Secretariat in Dhaka (19 July edition).

articles.title: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC)
articles.summary: ONORC allows NFSA beneficiaries to get subsidised foodgrains from any Fair Price Shop in the country using the same ration card.
articles.summary_hi: ONORC से NFSA लाभार्थी देश के किसी भी राशन दुकान से उसी राशन कार्ड पर सब्सिडी अनाज ले सकते हैं।
articles.content:
One Nation One Ration Card is a national portability scheme under the National Food Security Act (NFSA), implemented by the Department of Food and Public Distribution.

It uses Aadhaar-based authentication so migrant workers and their families can access PDS entitlements across states. It is integrated with ePoS devices at Fair Price Shops.

ONORC strengthens food security for inter-state migrants and supports the idea of ‘One Nation’ in welfare delivery.

For IB ACIO: NFSA link, Aadhaar authentication, and migrant portability are key points.
articles.content_hi:
ONORC: NFSA के तहत राष्ट्रव्यापी पोर्टेबिलिटी। खाद्य एवं सार्वजनिक वितरण विभाग।

आधार प्रमाणीकरण, ePoS। प्रवासी श्रमिकों के लिए महत्वपूर्ण।

IB ACIO: NFSA, Aadhaar, portability — याद रखें।
articles.question: One Nation One Ration Card mainly enables portability of benefits under which law?
articles.question_hi: वन नेशन वन राशन कार्ड मुख्यतः किस कानून के तहत लाभों की पोर्टेबिलिटी देता है?
articles.explanation: ONORC provides nationwide portability of ration entitlements under the National Food Security Act (NFSA).
articles.explanation_hi: ONORC National Food Security Act (NFSA) के तहत राशन लाभों की राष्ट्रव्यापी पोर्टेबिलिटी देता है।
articles.moreInfo: NFSA 2013 covers priority households and Antyodaya Anna Yojana beneficiaries.
articles.moreInfo_hi: NFSA 2013 — प्राथमिकता परिवार और Antyodaya Anna Yojana।

articles.title: IMF and World Bank — Bretton Woods Twins
articles.title_hi: IMF और विश्व बैंक — ब्रेटन वुड्स जुड़वां
articles.summary: IMF and the World Bank were created at the 1944 Bretton Woods Conference. Both are headquartered in Washington, D.C.
articles.summary_hi: IMF और विश्व बैंक 1944 Bretton Woods सम्मेलन में बने। दोनों का मुख्यालय Washington, D.C. में है।
articles.content:
The International Monetary Fund (IMF) and the World Bank were established after the Bretton Woods Conference (1944). Both have headquarters in Washington, D.C., USA.

IMF focuses on global monetary cooperation, exchange stability, and providing financial assistance to countries facing balance-of-payments problems. The World Bank Group focuses on long-term development finance and poverty reduction (IBRD, IDA, etc.).

India is a founding member of both. Voting power is linked to quotas/shareholding.

For IB ACIO: Bretton Woods 1944, HQ Washington D.C., IMF (BOP/stability) vs World Bank (development).
articles.content_hi:
Bretton Woods 1944। दोनों HQ: Washington D.C.।

IMF: मौद्रिक स्थिरता, BOP सहायता। World Bank: विकास वित्त, गरीबी कमी।

IB ACIO: 1944, Washington — याद रखें।
articles.question: IMF and the World Bank were created at which conference?
articles.question_hi: IMF और विश्व बैंक किस सम्मेलन में बनाए गए?
articles.explanation: Both institutions emerged from the 1944 Bretton Woods Conference.
articles.explanation_hi: दोनों संस्थाएं 1944 के Bretton Woods सम्मेलन से बनीं।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: NDB of BRICS is in Shanghai (13 July edition).
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: BRICS का NDB Shanghai में (13 जुलाई)।

articles.title: Rafale — Indo-French Fighter Aircraft Deal
articles.summary: India procured 36 Rafale multi-role fighters from France (Dassault). They strengthen the IAF’s air combat capability.
articles.summary_hi: भारत ने फ्रांस (Dassault) से 36 राफेल बहु-भूमिका लड़ाकू विमान खरीदे — IAF की क्षमता मजबूत।
articles.content:
Rafale is a 4.5-generation twin-engine multi-role fighter aircraft manufactured by Dassault Aviation of France.

India signed an Inter-Governmental Agreement with France in 2016 for 36 Rafale jets for the Indian Air Force. The aircraft can perform air superiority, ground attack, and nuclear delivery roles (as configured by the user nation).

Weapons associated with Rafale in Indian service include Meteor beyond-visual-range missiles and SCALP cruise missiles. A separate deal track has also covered Rafale-M for the Navy.

For IB ACIO: France/Dassault, 36 aircraft (2016 IGA), and Meteor/SCALP are exam points.
articles.content_hi:
राफेल: Dassault (France), 4.5 generation। 2016 में 36 विमान का समझौता।

Meteor, SCALP हथियार। नौसेना के लिए Rafale-M चर्चा।

IB ACIO: France, 36 jets, 2016 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Rafale fighter aircraft were procured by India from which country?
articles.question_hi: राफेल लड़ाकू विमान भारत ने किस देश से खरीदे?
articles.explanation: Rafale jets were procured from France (Dassault Aviation).
articles.explanation_hi: राफेल विमान फ्रांस (Dassault Aviation) से खरीदे गए।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: S-400 from Russia; Apache from USA (earlier editions).

articles.title: Mangalyaan — India’s Mars Orbiter Mission
articles.title_hi: मंगलयान — भारत का मार्स ऑर्बिटर मिशन
articles.summary: Mangalyaan (MOM) made India the first Asian nation and the first to reach Mars orbit in its maiden attempt (2014).
articles.summary_hi: मंगलयान (MOM) से भारत एशिया का पहला और पहली कोशिश में मंगल कक्षा में पहुंचने वाला देश बना (2014)।
articles.content:
The Mars Orbiter Mission (MOM), popularly called Mangalyaan, was launched by ISRO on 5 November 2013 aboard PSLV-C25 and entered Mars orbit on 24 September 2014.

India became the first country to succeed in reaching Mars orbit on its first attempt and the first Asian nation to reach Martian orbit. The mission studied Mars’ surface features, morphology, and atmosphere at a relatively low cost.

MOM demonstrated India’s deep-space capability and paved the way for later interplanetary ambitions.

For IB ACIO: launch 2013, Mars orbit 2014, PSLV-C25, first-attempt success.
articles.content_hi:
Mangalyaan: 5 नवंबर 2013 launch (PSLV-C25)। 24 सितंबर 2014 मंगल कक्षा।

पहली कोशिश में सफलता; एशिया में पहला।

IB ACIO: 2013 launch, 2014 orbit — याद रखें।
articles.question: Mangalyaan entered Mars orbit in which year?
articles.question_hi: मंगलयान किस वर्ष मंगल की कक्षा में प्रवेश किया?
articles.explanation: MOM entered Mars orbit on 24 September 2014.
articles.explanation_hi: MOM 24 सितंबर 2014 को मंगल कक्षा में प्रवेश किया।
articles.moreInfo: Related: PSLV (17 July), Chandrayaan-3 / Moon Day (20 July).

articles.title: Wildlife Protection Act, 1972
articles.summary: The Wildlife Protection Act, 1972 provides the legal framework for protecting wild animals, birds, and plants and for creating Protected Areas.
articles.summary_hi: वन्यजीव संरक्षण अधिनियम, 1972 जंगली जानवर, पक्षी, पौधे संरक्षण और Protected Areas का कानूनी ढांचा देता है।
articles.content:
The Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972 is the principal law for wildlife conservation in India. It provides for National Parks, Wildlife Sanctuaries, Conservation Reserves, and Community Reserves.

Schedules of the Act classify species by level of protection; Schedule I species get the highest protection. Hunting of scheduled animals is generally prohibited.

The Act has been amended several times; a major recent update strengthened provisions on invasive species and implementation. CITES obligations are also reflected through wildlife trade controls.

For IB ACIO: year (1972), Protected Area categories, and Schedule I highest protection.
articles.content_hi:
Wildlife Protection Act 1972। National Park, Sanctuary आदि।

Schedule I — सर्वोच्च संरक्षण। शिकार सामान्यतः प्रतिबंधित।

IB ACIO: 1972, Schedule I — याद रखें।
articles.question: The Wildlife Protection Act of India was enacted in which year?
articles.question_hi: भारत का वन्यजीव संरक्षण अधिनियम किस वर्ष पारित हुआ?
articles.explanation: The Wildlife (Protection) Act was enacted in 1972.
articles.moreInfo: Related: Project Tiger 1973, Project Elephant 1992, Ramsar sites.

articles.title: President of India — Election and Key Powers
articles.title_hi: भारत के राष्ट्रपति — चुनाव और प्रमुख शक्तियां
articles.summary: The President is the constitutional head of the Union, elected by an electoral college of MPs and MLAs for a 5-year term (Article 52 onwards).
articles.summary_hi: राष्ट्रपति संघ के संवैधानिक अध्यक्ष, सांसदों और विधायकों के निर्वाचक मंडल से 5 वर्ष के लिए चुने जाते हैं।
articles.content:
Article 52 states there shall be a President of India. The President is elected by an electoral college comprising elected members of both Houses of Parliament and elected members of State Legislative Assemblies (including Delhi and Puducherry), using proportional representation by single transferable vote.

Term is five years; eligible for re-election. Impeachment is for violation of the Constitution under Article 61.

The President appoints the Prime Minister, judges of the Supreme Court and High Courts, and is the Supreme Commander of the Armed Forces. Ordinary bills require Presidential assent (Articles 111 etc.).

For IB ACIO: electoral college composition, 5-year term, and Article 61 impeachment.
articles.content_hi:
धारा 52 — राष्ट्रपति। निर्वाचक मंडल: संसद + राज्य विधानसभाएं। 5 वर्ष कार्यकाल।

महाभियोग: धारा 61। सशस्त्र बलों के सर्वोच्च कमांडर।

IB ACIO: 5 वर्ष, Article 61 — याद रखें।
articles.question: The President of India can be removed by impeachment under which Article?
articles.question_hi: भारत के राष्ट्रपति को महाभियोग किस धारा के तहत हटाया जा सकता है?
articles.explanation: Article 61 provides the procedure for impeachment of the President for violation of the Constitution.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 61 संविधान के उल्लंघन पर राष्ट्रपति के महाभियोग की प्रक्रिया देती है।
articles.moreInfo: Article 72: pardon power. Article 123: Ordinance-making power.

articles.title: PM POSHAN — School Nutrition Programme
articles.summary: PM POSHAN (earlier Mid-Day Meal Scheme) provides hot cooked meals to children in government and government-aided schools.
articles.summary_hi: PM POSHAN (पूर्व मिड-डे मील) सरकारी व सहायता प्राप्त स्कूलों में बच्चों को गर्म पका भोजन देता है।
articles.content:
PM POSHAN (Pradhan Mantri Poshan Shakti Nirman) is the revamped form of the Mid-Day Meal Scheme, under the Ministry of Education.

It aims to improve nutritional status, enrolment, retention, and learning among school children. Meals are provided to students in Classes I–VIII in government and government-aided schools (coverage norms as notified).

The scheme is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme with cost-sharing between Centre and States/UTs. It links nutrition with the Right to Education goals.

For IB ACIO: earlier Mid-Day Meal, Ministry of Education, and nutrition + enrolment objectives.
articles.content_hi:
PM POSHAN: पूर्व Mid-Day Meal, शिक्षा मंत्रालय।

पोषण + नामांकन/रेटेंशन। केंद्र प्रायोजित योजना।

IB ACIO: शिक्षा मंत्रालय, Mid-Day Meal नया नाम — याद रखें।
articles.question: PM POSHAN scheme is implemented under which Union Ministry?
articles.question_hi: PM POSHAN योजना किस केंद्रीय मंत्रालय के तहत लागू होती है?
articles.explanation: PM POSHAN is under the Ministry of Education (revamped Mid-Day Meal Scheme).
articles.explanation_hi: PM POSHAN शिक्षा मंत्रालय के तहत है (परिवर्तित Mid-Day Meal)।
articles.moreInfo: Related: RTE Article 21A (20 July), NHM health schemes.

articles.title: Hockey — India’s Olympic Legacy and FIH
articles.title_hi: हॉकी — भारत की ओलंपिक विरासत और FIH
articles.summary: India is historically dominant in Olympic hockey with 8 gold medals. FIH is the world governing body for hockey.
articles.summary_hi: भारत ओलंपिक हॉकी में ऐतिहासिक रूप से प्रबल — 8 स्वर्ण। FIH विश्व शासी निकाय।
articles.content:
India has won 8 Olympic gold medals in men’s hockey — a record haul that defined Indian sport in the early–mid 20th century. The last Olympic gold before a long gap was in 1980 (Moscow); India won bronze at Tokyo 2020 and Paris 2024.

The International Hockey Federation (FIH) governs world hockey. Major events include the FIH Hockey World Cup, Pro League, and Champions Trophy (historical).

Major Dhyan Chand is India’s legendary hockey icon; National Sports Day is celebrated on 29 August (his birthday).

For IB ACIO: 8 Olympic golds, FIH, National Sports Day 29 August (Dhyan Chand).
articles.content_hi:
भारत: ओलंपिक में 8 हॉकी स्वर्ण। Tokyo 2020 व Paris 2024 कांस्य।

FIH विश्व शासी निकाय। National Sports Day: 29 अगस्त (ध्यान चंद)।

IB ACIO: 8 gold, 29 August — याद रखें।
articles.question: National Sports Day in India is celebrated on which date?
articles.question_hi: भारत में राष्ट्रीय खेल दिवस किस तिथि को मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: National Sports Day is observed on 29 August, Major Dhyan Chand’s birthday.
articles.explanation_hi: राष्ट्रीय खेल दिवस 29 अगस्त को मेजर ध्यान चंद की जयंती पर मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Olympics 2024 medal haul (10 July edition).
